case_title: GREENSTEEL A DIV. OF POLYVISION VS CONTINENTAL BUILDING SPECIALTIES CO. INC.

WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO RIVERSIDE COUNTY AS TO PLAINTIFF GREENSTEEL A DIV. OF POLYVISION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREENSTEEL A DIV. OF POLYVISION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CONTINENTAL BUILDING SPECIALTIES CO. INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CONTINENTAL BUILDING SPECIALTIES CO. INC. RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT GREENSTEEL A DIV. OF POLYVISION $3,081.32 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,161.32 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT FILED AS TO DEFENDANT CONTINENTAL BUILDING SPECIALTIES CO. INC.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-08-1996, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO APR-15-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF GREENSTEEL A DIV. OF POLYVISION

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,060.89 FILED BY GREENSTEEL A DIV. OF POLYVISION AS TO DEFENDANT CONTINENTAL BUILDING SPECIALTIES CO. INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-1996 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
THE COURT FINDS THAT GREENSTEEL A DIVISION OF POLYVISION IS A CORPORATION IN GOOD STANDING & QUALIFIED TO DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO RIVERSIDE COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO PLAINTIFF GREENSTEEL A DIV. OF POLYVISION
